name: Sinsera Node (Pi 5 8GB SD secondary → sinsera.co + Claude-on-USB)
description: Secondary kiosk: cage+cog (WPE on DRM) → https://sinsera.co/?kiosk=1 (auto-login dashboard), NO cursor (touch), auto-detect display (native res). Claude Code builds off whatever USB is inserted (ttyd + tmux + auto-resume). All learnings baked: getty@tty1 enabled, logind seat, cloud-init off, wizard-mask, WiFi rfkill-unblock, network-wait before cog, SSH key + NOPASSWD sudo. Bakes node-1 + clones node-2.

preconfigured.first_boot: claude login once for the USB build agent

notes: UNVERIFIED on hardware; SSH baked for tuning.
16GB main runs on NVMe — no .img (this is the 8GB SD secondaries).
